mission: Create a 100% Dark Mode Dashboard that feels like a premium SaaS product, not a generic admin template. Use glassmorphism, subtle gradients, and deep slate backgrounds.

headings.usage: All headings (h1-h6). Use tracking-tight for h1/h2.

glassmorphism.header: bg-slate-950/60 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 sticky top-0 z-50

effects.tracing_beam: absolute left-0 w-1 h-full bg-gradient-to-b from-[#5B6CFF] to-[#8A6CFF] rounded-r-full

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#5B6CFF] to-[#8A6CFF] text-white hover:opacity-90 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(91,108,255,0.2)] rounded-lg font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-700 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg font-medium

inputs.style: bg-slate-950/50 border border-slate-800 focus:border-[#5B6CFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#5B6CFF] rounded-lg text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-500 transition-all duration-200

cards.style: bg-slate-900/40 border border-white/5 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm p-6

login_register.wrapper: min-h-screen w-full flex items-center justify-center bg-[#020617] relative overflow-hidden
login_register.card: w-full max-w-md bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-2xl relative z-10
login_register.background_elements: Add a large, blurred gradient orb in the background (bg-indigo-600/20 blur-[100px] w-[500px] h-[500px] rounded-full absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2)

dashboard.sidebar: w-64 hidden md:flex flex-col border-r border-white/5 bg-slate-950/50 backdrop-blur-xl

design_philosophy: No 'AI Slop': Avoid generic, flat designs.
Dark Mode Dominance: Use varied shades of slate, not just black.
Micro-Interactions: Every button, input, and card must have a hover state.
Data-Test-IDs: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
JS Files: The project uses .js files, not .tsx. Adjust imports accordingly.
accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios are met (Slate 400 on Slate 900 is borderline, use Slate 300/200 for text).
Do not use transparent backgrounds where text readability is compromised.

file_conventions.components: Use named exports: export const Button = ...
file_conventions.pages: Use default exports: export default function Dashboard() ...

instructions_to_main_agent: Use the 'visual_enhancers' strictly. Do not use default Shadow DOM shadows.
Implement the 'primary_gradient' on the main Call-to-Actions.
For charts, use Recharts with custom tooltips styled like the glass cards.
